iree_add_all_subdirs()

set(_iree_profile_platform_defines "")
if(IREE_HAL_DRIVER_AMDGPU)
  list(APPEND _iree_profile_platform_defines "IREE_PROFILE_HAVE_AMDGPU_ATT=1")
else()
  list(APPEND _iree_profile_platform_defines "IREE_PROFILE_HAVE_AMDGPU_ATT=0")
endif()
set(_iree_profile_platform_deps "")
if(IREE_HAL_DRIVER_AMDGPU)
  list(APPEND _iree_profile_platform_deps iree::tooling::profile::att)
endif()
iree_cc_binary(
  NAME
    iree-profile
  SRCS
    "iree-profile.c"
  DEFINES
    ${_iree_profile_platform_defines}
  DEPS
    iree::base
    iree::base::tooling::flags
    iree::tooling::profile::commands
    iree::tooling::profile::help
    ${_iree_profile_platform_deps}
)

iree_execution_test_suite(
  NAME
    execution_test
  MANIFESTS
    "iree-profile.test.json"
  TOOLS
    "iree-profile=iree::tools::iree-profile"
)
